summary: The share of parking and camera summonses paid within 90 days has climbed steadily, from 66.2% in FY22 to 69.6% in FY25, comfortably ahead of the City's 65% target. DOF attributes continued gains in collections to its payment-plan options — including a standard installment plan and a moderate-income plan for motorists below a set income threshold — and to its Stipulated Fine Program, which collected $52.8 million in FY25, up nearly 15% from FY24.

sources.label: NYC Comptroller, "Selected Aspects of Parking Violations Operations to Collect Fines and Fees" (follow-up)
NYC Department of Finance, Parking Ticket Payment Plans

oneLiner: increasing as DOF's payment plans and Stipulated Fine Program drive higher on-time collection
